questionHtml: Using the data in the stacked column graph, describe the features that characterize the B2 enterotype.
markschemeHtml:
1. nearly half is Bacteroides / more Bacteroides (than other enterotypes);
  2. few Prevotella/fewer Prevotella than in P and R
    OR
    less Faecalibacterium than other enterotypes
    OR
    Ruminococcus is the lowest in B2;
  3. only 40 % other taxa / fewer other taxa (than other enterotypes) / less overall diversity (of taxa);

meta.title: Using the data in the stacked column graph, describe the features that characterize the B2 enterotype.
